spirit:component.spirit:name: conv

spirit:field.spirit:name: AP_START
spirit:field.spirit:description: Control signal Register for 'ap_start'.

spirit:field.spirit:name: AP_DONE
spirit:field.spirit:description: Control signal Register for 'ap_done'.

spirit:field.spirit:name: AP_IDLE
spirit:field.spirit:description: Control signal Register for 'ap_idle'.

spirit:field.spirit:name: AP_READY
spirit:field.spirit:description: Control signal Register for 'ap_ready'.

spirit:field.spirit:name: RESERVED_1
spirit:field.spirit:description: Reserved. 0s on read.

spirit:field.spirit:name: AUTO_RESTART
spirit:field.spirit:description: Control signal Register for 'auto_restart'.

spirit:field.spirit:name: RESERVED_2
spirit:field.spirit:description: Reserved. 0s on read.

spirit:field.spirit:name: Enable
spirit:field.spirit:description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

spirit:field.spirit:name: RESERVED
spirit:field.spirit:description: Reserved. 0s on read.

spirit:field.spirit:name: CHAN0_INT_EN
spirit:field.spirit:description: Enable Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt. 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled.

spirit:field.spirit:name: CHAN1_INT_EN
spirit:field.spirit:description: Enable Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt. 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled.

spirit:field.spirit:name: RESERVED
spirit:field.spirit:description: Reserved. 0s on read.

spirit:field.spirit:name: CHAN0_INT_ST
spirit:field.spirit:description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 input interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 input interrup

spirit:field.spirit:name: CHAN1_INT_ST
spirit:field.spirit:description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 input interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 input interrup

spirit:field.spirit:name: RESERVED
spirit:field.spirit:description: Reserved. 0s on read.

spirit:field.spirit:name: in1_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of in1_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: in2_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of in2_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: in3_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of in3_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: in4_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of in4_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: w1_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of w1_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: w2_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of w2_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: w3_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of w3_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: w4_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of w4_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: b_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of b_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: out1_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of out1_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: out2_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of out2_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: out3_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of out3_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: out4_V
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of out4_V

spirit:field.spirit:name: ch_in
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of ch_in

spirit:field.spirit:name: ch_out
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of ch_out

spirit:field.spirit:name: fsize
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of fsize

spirit:field.spirit:name: stride
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of stride

spirit:field.spirit:name: kernel
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of kernel

spirit:field.spirit:name: act
spirit:field.spirit:description: Bit 31 to 0 Data signal of act

spirit:component.spirit:description: An IP generated by Vivado HLS
